sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9931" key="a)ntizhli/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντι-ζηλία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n9931.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rivalry,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:39:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">39.27</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:2:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.28</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
